invoice_id: # EXACT DUPLICATE - Should trigger high severity anomaly
# UNUSUAL AMOUNT - Much higher than vendor's typical range
# RAPID REPEAT - Multiple payments to same vendor in short time
# DORMANT VENDOR - Vendor hasn't been used in 180+ days
# VENDOR PAYMENT SPIKE - Unusually high monthly spending
# DEPARTMENT SPENDING SPIKE - Unusual IT department spending
# TEMPORAL CLUSTERING - Many transactions in 7 days
# QUARTER-END SPIKE - End of Q1 spending
# CONCENTRATION RISK - Single vendor with high percentage of total spend
# SUSPICIOUS PATTERN - Same amount multiple times
